# Solid Propellant Rocket Motors: Internal Ballistics

**Theory, Equations, and Numerical Simulation**

This book provides a comprehensive technical resource on the internal ballistics of solid propellant rocket motors.

## Scope

The material covers:
- Propellant chemistry and burning rate laws
- Solid grain geometry and design
- Chamber pressure prediction and mass balance
- Thrust curve generation and performance analysis
- Numerical modeling techniques

## How to Use This Book

- Use the sidebar to navigate chapters
- Equations are typeset using LaTeX
- Code examples (when added) can be executed directly

**Work in progress** — New chapters and simulation examples will be added regularly.

::: {.callout-tip}
Contributions and suggestions are welcome!
:::
